arts.ttl: Arsenal Invincible reveals his FIGHT with Robin van Persie after being left 'fuming' during his first training session over bizarre reason
arts.sum: Van Persie spent eight years at the club after joining from Feyenoord in 2004 and helped them to win the FA Cup before leaving for Manchester United in 2012.

arts.ttl: Fortuna Sittard boss on bench for Feyenoord: Danny Buijs survives suspension after comment towards referee
arts.sum: Fortuna Sittard coach Danny Buijs has been acquitted for comments made against referee Ingmar Oostrom.

arts.ttl: Liverpool go all-in on transfer for Feyenoord star
arts.sum: Paixão has already scored 14 goals and provided 16 assists in all competitions this season, putting him on the radar of several Premier League and Serie A clubs. Liverpool see Paixão as a potential reinforcement for the attacking width.
